summary: Completed comprehensive testing of NurseReady app fixes. Backend APIs 100% functional, frontend 90% functional with significant improvements from previous iteration.

ui_bugs.issue: AI Chat navigation button not routing to chat page properly

integration_issues.issue: Navigation overlay preventing proper routing to AI chat interface

passed_tests: All 12 backend API endpoints working perfectly (100% success)
Emergency page displays emergency cards correctly (found 8 cards)
Lab Values page loads with 16 lab values and filtering works perfectly
Abbreviations page shows search input and category filters working
Drug search functionality working with metformin and aspirin
BMI Calculator working correctly (calculated 24.2 kg/m² for 70kg/170cm)
Home page loads with greeting, search bar, and category cards
Emergency FAB button navigates to emergency page
Category filtering working on Lab Values and Abbreviations pages
Search functionality working on Abbreviations page
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix AI Chat navigation routing issue - the navigation button is not properly routing to the AI chat page. Backend AI chat API is working correctly.
